parts.label: Control Panel
parts.description: Top-left panel containing the power button and status indicator lights.
parts.visual_evidence: Power button with green LED ring and status icons on the top-left edge.
unknowns: Exact button mapping for wireless models vs USB-only models

parts.label: EcoTank Ink Reservoirs
parts.description: Four integrated front-facing ink compartments labeled BK, Y, M, and C.
parts.visual_evidence: Transparent vertical windows showing ink levels on the right side.
unknowns: Current ink volume levels inside the tanks

parts.label: Paper Output Tray
parts.description: Retractable tray located at the bottom front center to catch prints.
parts.visual_evidence: Horizontal slot and pull-out plastic tray at the lower front.
unknowns: Maximum paper capacity of the output tray

parts.label: Scanner Lid
parts.description: Top flat textured plastic cover that lifts to reveal the scanning bed.
parts.visual_evidence: Flat top surface with a textured pattern and rear hinges.

result.object_summary: An all-in-one color inkjet printer featuring an integrated front-facing ink tank system.

steps.title: Power On
steps.instruction: Press the power button on the control panel to turn on the printer.

steps.title: Check Ink Levels
steps.instruction: Visually inspect the front ink tank windows to ensure adequate ink levels.

steps.title: Prepare Output Tray
steps.instruction: Pull out the paper output tray before starting a print job.
